notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons manager remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.16+.
Main menu section label is now 'Подарки / Лид-магниты'; inside the flow the professional term is 'Лид-магниты'.
Active lead-magnet conditions enabled: access for everyone, current-channel subscription, comment under post, keyword in comment, subscription to up to 5 channels.
Invite-friends/referral remains planned because it requires referral link generation and invite tracking.
Lead conditions are persisted after the final gift save so newly created post settings keep the selected condition.
Gift/lead-magnet delivery is guarded before sending material to the user.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: still layered; after acceptance merge admin-flow wrappers into one clean core module.
